title: Orthemma (concrete occurrence) with versioned identity and lineage

identity_key.description: kappa — which thing this is (survives change)

version.description: v — which state/edition of that thing

kind.description: domain kind (artifact, batch, position, directive, reified-episode, ...)

lineage.description: labeled successor edges INTO this occurrence (Definition 6): which action on which predecessor produced it

reified_from_episode.description: iota_n embedding: set when this occurrence is an episode cast as a higher-audit case
